title: Convert DB-in-mount dashboard + add scoped PubSub
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/db_in_mount_dashboard.ex has DB queries running twice (once per HTTP mount, once per WS mount) plus an unguarded PubSub subscribe with an insufficiently scoped topic. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/dashboard_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.DashboardLive): (1) move ALL queries (invoices, metrics, unread_count) out of mount into handle_params, (2) gate PubSub.subscribe with if connected?(socket), (3) scope the topic to the user via "dashboard:user:#{current_user.id}", (4) keep the {:new_notification, _} handle_info clause, (5) mount only assigns current_user + empty defaults. All four changes are required.

must_not_contain:
def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    current_user = Accounts.get_current_user()
    invoices

tier_rationale: Four distinct fixes that must all be applied. Sonnet typically catches 2 of 4 without targeted prompting.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes phoenix-thinking Iron Law + oliver-kriska connected?/1 rule
